title: CDN Asset Migration — Completion & Verification Report

rewrites.blog_explanation: Blog images are served from DB (featured_image column); no static /blog/*.jpg refs in code.
rewrites.preexisting_broken_explanation: 76 .jpg paths referenced by code but never present on disk pre-migration. NOT introduced by this migration; documented for separate cleanup.

verification.dist_legacy_refs_explanation: Refs to non-existent .jpg files (pre-existing 404s) — same broken state as before migration
verification.cdn_refs_in_dist: Confirmed in SelfCleaningLitterBoxLanding, TrainingLandingPage, BlogPost chunks

step5_readiness.blocker: pcie2_creatives = 79 / 1000 required. Creative engine timed out at 150s edge limit during prior bootstrap. Requires queue-based worker run (~6 hours) to fill to >1000 before Step 5 (Canary) can begin.
step5_readiness.recommended_next_action: Approve creative-engine queue worker run with $20 budget cap; estimate ~921 creatives × ~$0.015 ≈ $14. Then Step 5 canary can proceed.

blockers: PCIE2 creatives count below threshold for Step 5 — bootstrap continuation required.
76 pre-existing dangling .jpg refs (separate from migration scope; recommend image_url cleanup migration).
rollback_plan: All manifests committed to src/data/migration. Revert this commit + restore public/images/products & public/blog from git history to fully rollback.
